items.title: Dario Amodei only has 1 direct report, his chief of staff—and everyone else reports to his sister: ‘It’s incredibly freeing’
items.summary: As $965 billion Anthropic prepares to IPO, the AI firm’s CEO Dario Amodei admits he’s only been managing one person—and passing the rest to his sister.
items.titleZh: 达里奥·阿莫迪只有一个直接下属，他的幕僚长，其他人都向他的妹妹汇报：“这真是令人难以置信的自由。”
items.summaryZh: 随着9650亿美元的Anthropic准备首次公开募股，这家人工智能公司的首席执行官Dario Amodei承认，他只管理过一个人，其余的都交给了他的妹妹。

items.title: Silicon Valley’s Elite Financial Advisers Say This Era of Wealth Is Different
items.summary: The rich are getting richer. Here’s what wealth advisers are telling their tech clients right now.
items.titleZh: 硅谷的精英财务顾问表示，这个财富时代是不同的
items.summaryZh: 富人越来越富有。这是财富顾问现在告诉他们的科技客户的。

items.title: The Democratic Base Is Ready to Go
items.titleZh: 民主基础已经准备就绪

items.title: Sebastian Kurz went from Austria's youngest chancellor to building a $3 billion AI cybersecurity startup
items.summary: Backed by top investors, DREAM is expanding globally with technology designed to protect nations from state-sponsored attacks.
items.titleZh: Sebastian Kurz从奥地利最年轻的总理转变为建立一家价值30亿美元的人工智能网络安全初创公司
items.summaryZh: 在顶级投资者的支持下，DREAM正在全球范围内扩张，其技术旨在保护国家免受国家支持的攻击。

items.title: The ‘godfather of AI’ called xAI a failure and warned of a bubble. He’s also selling the alternative.
items.summary: Yann LeCun has never been quiet about his doubts, and his latest target is one of the most valuable companies on earth. Elon Musk’s xAI is “kind of a failure” that will not be able to compete on the frontier with OpenAI and Anthropic, LeCun, the founder of AM…
items.titleZh: 这位“人工智能教父”称xAI是一个失败，并警告称存在泡沫。他也在出售替代品。
items.summaryZh: Yann LeCun从未对自己的怀疑保持沉默，他的最新目标是世界上最有价值的公司之一。埃隆·马斯克的xAI“有点失败”，无法在前沿与OpenAI和AM创始人Anthropic、LeCun竞争…

items.title: California expected a tax bonanza from AI IPOs. Modern compensation structures may blunt the windfall.
items.summary: SpaceX is now valued at $2.5 trillion. OpenAI and Anthropic are expected to go public later this year at valuations approaching $1 trillion each. California, where all three companies are based or have significant operations, should be looking at the largest …
items.titleZh: 加利福尼亚州预计人工智能IPO将带来丰厚的税收。现代薪酬结构可能会削弱这笔意外之财。
items.summaryZh: SpaceX现在的估值为2.5万亿美元。OpenAI和Anthropic预计将于今年晚些时候上市，估值接近1万亿美元。加利福尼亚州是这三家公司的总部所在地或拥有重要业务的地方，应该考虑最大的…

items.title: Google Home Speaker (2026) vs. Amazon Echo Dot Max: Why I'm split on these $99 rivals
items.summary: Both Google and Amazon have generative AI-powered smart speakers for under $100, so which one stands out?
items.titleZh: 谷歌家用扬声器（2026）与亚马逊Echo Dot Max：为什么我在这99美元的竞争对手身上分道扬镳
items.summaryZh: 谷歌和亚马逊都有不到100美元的人工智能智能智能音箱，那么哪一个脱颖而出呢？

items.title: Tesla loses its head of quality to Stellantis
items.summary:
Tesla’s head of quality, Kahiree Gans, is leaving the automaker to return to Stellantis — the same company Tesla poached him from less than three years ago.
Gans has updated his LinkedIn profile to list his new role as “Vice President, Global SQD” at Stellant…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉将质量负责人输给了Stellantis
items.summaryZh: 特斯拉的质量主管Kahiree Gans将离开这家汽车制造商，回到Stellantis——特斯拉不到三年前从同一家公司挖走了他。

items.title: Retirement savers may own SpaceX — or soon will — and not even know it
items.summary: Investors who missed the SpaceX IPO may already have exposure to the stock through mutual funds, ETFs or retirement accounts.
items.titleZh: 退休储蓄者可能拥有SpaceX，或者很快就会拥有，但他们甚至不知道
items.summaryZh: 错过SpaceX首次公开募股的投资者可能已经通过共同基金、ETF或退休账户投资了该股票。

items.title: GTA VI pre-orders open June 25. Rockstar revealed the cover art. No price yet.
items.summary: Rockstar Games confirmed that pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI open on June 25. The game will be available on the PlayStation Store, Microsoft Store, and at select retailers. Rockstar also revealed the official cover art, which features protagonists Jason a…
items.titleZh: GTA VI预订将于6月25日开放。Rockstar公布了封面设计。目前还没有价格。
items.summaryZh: Rockstar Games证实，《侠盗猎车手VI》的预购将于6月25日开放。该游戏将在PlayStation Store、Microsoft Store和部分零售商上发售。Rockstar还公布了官方封面艺术，主角Jason和…

items.title: Just 16% of Americans think AI will benefit society, despite chatbot use climbing to 49% of US adults
items.summary: The Pew Research Center found that 49% of US adults now use chatbots, up from 33% two years ago. This includes roughly one in four who use these tools on daily basis. Fifty-one percent say they don't use chatbots at all, the majority of whom are 50 and older.…
items.titleZh: 尽管聊天机器人的使用率攀升至49%，但只有16%的美国人认为人工智能将造福社会
items.summaryZh: 皮尤研究中心发现，49%的美国成年人现在使用聊天机器人，高于两年前的33%。这包括大约四分之一的人每天使用这些工具。51%的人表示他们根本不使用聊天机器人，其中大多数人年龄在50岁以上。…
